member.name: P:PC.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:PC.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:PC.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.FailureMessage
member.summary: Property to hold the failure message to be displayed to the user
member.value: A string the developer choses to use
member.returns: The string message (or a NullReferenceException if it isnt provided)

member.name: P:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.Text
member.summary: Readonly property to hold the text of the CAPTCHA image

member.name: P:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.Image
member.summary: Readonly property to hold the image

member.name: P:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.Width
member.summary: Readonly property to hold the width of the image

member.name: P:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.Height
member.summary: Readonly property to hold the height of the image

member.name: P:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.MainColor
member.summary: Readonly property to hold the main color of the image

member.name: P:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.SecondaryColor
member.summary: Readonly property to hold the secondaty color of the image

member.name: P:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.HatchType
member.summary: Readonly property to hold the style of HatchBrush used

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: First New Constructor
member.param: String to be displayed on the image

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Second New Constructor
member.param: String to be displayed on the image

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Third New Constructor
member.param: String to be displayed on the image
Name of the font to be used

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,PC.PC.CaptchaImage.HatchStyles,System.Drawing.Color,System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Fourth New Constructor
member.param: String to be displayed on the image
Name of the font to be used

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.Finalize
member.summary: Finalize method

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose method

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Overridable Dispose method (uses the boolean disposing variable)

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.SetPicSize(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Method for setting the size of the image

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.SetFont(System.String)
member.summary: Procedure to set the font to be used on the CAPTCHA image
member.param: Name of the font (Verdana, Arial, Tahoma, etc)

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.BuildCAPTCHA
member.summary: Method for generating the CAPTCHA image

member.name: M:PC.PC.CaptchaImage.GenerateRandomString(System.Int32)
member.summary: Function to generate the random string to be displayed on the image
member.remarks: To keep track of do this: Session("CaptchaText") = GenerateRandomString
